headline: Centene Philanthropy Targets Homelessness And Social Health To Support Contracts
summary: Centene (NYSE:CNC) has committed US$10 million to expand the Community Care Campus Long Beach, supporting individuals experiencing homelessness through facility upgrades and program funding. The Centene Foundation has also launched a new US$750,000 grant program in Missouri to address social drivers of health across the state. These initiatives extend Centene’s activity beyond its core managed Medicaid and Medicare operations into broader community health and housing support. For you as an...
